heading: Removal of drift from New York Harbor
label: 607 Removal of drift from New York Harbor
text: So much as may be necessary of any appropriations made for specific portions of New York Harbor and its immediate tributaries may be allotted by the Secretary of the Army for the maintenance of these waterways by the collection and removal of drift.
notes: CodificationSection is from act , the Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1917.Aug. 8, 1917
